replies.msg: 我利終於有冠

這下子事情真的不妙了！眼看NBA復賽在即，目前各隊才陸續剛開始進行新冠肺炎檢測複檢就傳出壞消息，丹佛金塊當家中鋒Nikola Jokic的檢測結果為陽性，證實感染到病毒。

消息人士周二告訴ESPN，Jokic在塞爾維亞的冠狀病毒測試呈陽性反應，原本預計返回丹佛向球隊報到的時間點將會延遲。而讓人擔憂的是有其他消息來源指出，過去數周還有幾名球員確診，是否影響到復賽值得關注。

replies.msg:
Marc Stein
@TheSteinLine
·
5 分鐘
The Lakers, league sources say, are expected to finalize a rest-of-the-season contract with J.R. Smith before Tuesday's 11:59 PM ET closure of the NBA's "transaction window"

Welcome to the Lakers, JR!

https://twitter.com/wojespn/status/1277634314142994432?s=21

Free agent guard J.R. Smith and the Lakers are working through final steps of a deal today and he will be added to roster for the Orlando restart, sources tell ESPN.
JR

Lakers and Smith have been in talks since Avery Bradley opted-out of the restart, and those will culminate with a deal that will include him on the roster Lakers will submit to NBA on Wednesday, per sources.
